decision.thresholdRange: 0..100 inclusive; direct stage calls cover 0/50/99/100 monotonically
decision.workerZeroSentinel: GridSplitRecipeV1 crop.threshold=0 remains donor-compatible crop-disabled so the reviewed G1-05 baseline does not drift
decision.padding: expand retained bounds equally and clamp to the original cell
decision.empty: canonical stage returns null; the existing Worker result policy materializes its reviewed 1x1 transparent output
decision.recipeOwnership: reads an exact own-data GridSplitRecipeV1.crop snapshot; no store or durable schema added

pixelGolden.source: 5x4 RGBA with alpha=1 and alpha=255 content inside a 4x4 source cell

hostile.sourceBounds: zero-size, OOB and source-pixel over-budget rejected
hostile.typedArrays: wrong-kind, wrong-size, detached, SharedArrayBuffer and shadowed length rejected; genuine cross-realm accepted; shadowed subarray is never invoked
hostile.records: unknown keys and accessors rejected without getter invocation
hostile.cancellation: preflight and exact 4096-pixel scan checkpoint pass
hostile.invariants: deterministic, monotonic threshold, padding containment, cell bounds and exact source pixels

performance.fixture: 2048x1024 opaque RGBA scan plus exact copy

verification.realWorker: pass; identical RGB with alpha 1/127/128/255 trims exactly to alpha 128/255 at threshold 50
